message:
fix(validation): enforce ID length limit on base hash only, not full hierarchical ID

Hierarchical IDs like "0v1.1.1.1" can exceed MAX_ID_HASH_LEN when
the total string including dot-separated child segments is measured.
Move the length check to apply only to the base hash segment so
deeply nested child IDs are no longer incorrectly rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
